overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting exploration of a Gothic castle interior. The player character moves through a furnished circular tower room, descends a ladder and spiral staircase, traverses a high wooden walkway with arched windows, and continues through teal-painted corridors with portraits.

segments.scene_description: The player explores a circular tower room with stone walls and astronomical decor. The space contains a red leather armchair, a globe on a wooden stand, and a large tapestry. The character walks around the room and approaches a wooden trapdoor in the floor, opening it to reveal a ladder below.

exits ladder into spiral staircase room with portraits

segments.scene_description: The character descends a metal ladder through the trapdoor into a narrow shaft, then emerges into a stone spiral staircase area. The walls are lined with framed portraits and a wooden handrail curves along the stairs.

segments.scene_description: The character descends a grand spiral staircase with stone steps and arched windows. Another student walks ahead, and framed portraits line the walls as the camera follows the curve of the stairs downward toward a wooden walkway.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated wooden catwalk in a grand hall with Gothic stone columns and tall arched windows. The player passes a student leaning on the railing and continues toward an ornate carved wooden door at the far end of the walkway.

segments.scene_description: The character opens the ornate door and enters a narrow corridor with teal-painted walls and dark wood paneling. Framed portraits line the walls as the character walks forward, ascends a wooden staircase, and approaches a diagonal-planked wooden door at the end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded astronomical tower room down into the expansive, ornate corridors of a Gothic castle. It begins by exploring a circular stone chamber filled with astronomical decor and a red leather armchair before the camera descends through a wooden trapdoor via a metal ladder. As the character emerges into a stone spiral staircase, the view follows the curve of the walls lined with framed portraits, descending past arched windows and another student toward a wooden walkway. The scene then expands onto an elevated catwalk overlooking a grand hall with massive stone columns and tall windows, moving past a leaning student toward an ornate carved door. Finally, the camera passes through this door into a narrow corridor with teal-painted walls and dark wood paneling, ascending a small flight of stairs toward a diagonal-planked wooden door.
